entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume known as a significant source of food allergens.

entities.name: TREE NUTS
entities.description: A group of nuts including walnuts and almonds known as sources of allergens.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain that is a common source of food allergens.

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume that is a common source of food allergens.

entities.name: KIDNEY BEAN
entities.description: A legume that is a common source of food allergens.

entities.name: FISH
entities.description: An aquatic organism that is a common source of food allergens.

entities.name: SHELLFISH
entities.description: Aquatic invertebrates that are common sources of food allergens.

entities.name: EGGS
entities.description: An animal product that is a common source of food allergens.

entities.name: MILK
entities.description: An animal product that is a common source of food allergens.

entities.name: FOODBORNE ALLERGIES
entities.description: Adverse immunological reactions triggered by bio-molecules in food.

entities.name: ALLERGENS
entities.description: Bio-molecules, usually proteins, that trigger immunological reactions.

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Bio-molecules that often act as allergens in food.

entities.name: IMMUNOLOGICAL REACTIONS
entities.description: Unusual reactions triggered by allergens, potentially life-threatening.

entities.name: ALLERGEN GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which genes for allergens are expressed in crops.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: A technique used to develop low allergen food crops.

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: A technique used to develop low allergen food crops.

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique used to develop low allergen food crops.

entities.name: LOW ALLERGEN
entities.description: A desired characteristic of food crops to protect consumer health.

entities.name: CONSUMER HEALTH
entities.description: The state of health of people consuming food, threatened by allergies.

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: The discipline of ensuring food does not cause harm to the consumer.

entities.name: DETECTION
entities.description: The process of identifying the presence of allergens.

entities.name: DIAGNOSIS
entities.description: The process of identifying a food allergy in a patient.

entities.name: CURE
entities.description: The process of treating or eliminating a food allergy.
